name: Bortex Global Limited
summary: Bortex Global Limited, an investment holding company, develops, manufactures, and exports light-emitting diode (LED) lighting products to customers in Canada, the United States, Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, Brazil, France, Japan, the Philippines, Thailand, South Africa, and Italy. The company offers LED decorative and string lights products, including straight line, icicle, beard garland, crab, wreath, flower, meteor shower, sphere, net, and smart string lights, as well as toy and tree lights; LED commercial lighting products, such as tube lights, ceiling lamps, and light bulbs; and LED solar system series products. It serves retailers, wholesalers, real estate developers, and other fields, as well as agricultural technology production companies. Bortex Global Limited was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
